a.text: The game is finished! I played X in the middle-right position, which was the last empty space. The result is a tie - neither of us got three in a row. Good game with Bob!

a.text:
Yes, the game finished and it was a **tie**. 

All 9 spaces on the board were filled with no three-in-a-row for either player:

```
X | X | O
O | O | X
X | O | X
```

Neither X (me) nor O (Bob) achieved three in a row, so it ended in a draw.
